Name: update_users_many
SQL: WITH _mutation_result_0 AS (UPDATE "auth"."users" SET "display_name" = $1::text WHERE users."id" = $2::uuid AND (users."id" = $3::uuid) RETURNING *), mutation_result_0_post_check AS (SELECT CASE WHEN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM _mutation_result_0 WHERE _mutation_result_0."id" = $4::uuid) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM _mutation_result_0) THEN 1 ELSE (SELECT 0 FROM (SELECT constellation_throw_error('check constraint of an insert/update permission has failed', 'ZZ901')) x) END AS status), mutation_result_0 AS (SELECT * FROM _mutation_result_0 WHERE (SELECT status FROM mutation_result_0_post_check) = 1) SELECT jsonb_build_array((SELECT json_build_object('affected_rows', (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM mutation_result_0), 'returning', (SELECT COALESCE(json_agg(row_to_json("_e")), '[]'::json) FROM (SELECT mutation_result_0."id" AS "id", mutation_result_0."display_name" AS "displayName" FROM mutation_result_0) AS "_e"))))
